compiled_state.title: Create normalize-imports and scaffold-route integration tests against fixtures
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create tests/integration/test-normalize-imports-integration.sh and tests/integration/test-scaffold-route-integration.sh.

### normalize-imports tests (test-normalize-imports-integration.sh):
1. test_python_normalize_imports_on_fixture: Run normalize-imports on python-project fixture. Assert: all Python files have sorted, deduplicated imports. Fixture test suite still passes.
2. test_typescript_normalize_imports_on_fixture: Run on typescript-project fixture. Assert: imports sorted. TypeScript still compiles.
3. test_normalize_imports_idempotency: Run twice — second run has files_changed=[] (already normalized). Fixture tests pass.
4. test_normalize_imports_determinism: 3 consecutive runs → same output hash.

### scaffold-route tests (test-scaffold-route-integration.sh):
1. test_flask_scaffold_creates_valid_python: Run scaffold-route (Flask) in temp dir. Generated blueprint.py is valid Python (py_compile). Generated template.html is non-empty.
2. test_nextjs_scaffold_creates_valid_typescript: Generated page.tsx is valid TypeScript (tsc --noEmit on file).
3. test_scaffold_route_idempotency: Run twice — second run skips (files exist), returns files_changed=[].
4. test_scaffold_route_determinism: 3 runs on fresh temp dir produce identical file contents (hash comparison).

Skip gracefully if fixtures not available or node/python missing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/integration/test-normalize-imports-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-normalize-imports-integration.sh
- [ ] tests/integration/test-scaffold-route-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-scaffold-route-integration.sh
- [ ] Both files have valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/integration/test-normalize-imports-integration.sh && bash -n tests/integration/test-scaffold-route-integration.sh
- [ ] Skip gracefully when environment unavailable
  Verify: TEST_INTEGRATION_SKIP=1 bash tests/integration/test-normalize-imports-integration.sh; [ $? -eq 0 ]
